banner.text: Litsea's official job board is now live.

hero.subtitle: The official job platform from Litsea Centro de Capacitación. Verified therapists for luxury hotels and spas in Cancún, Playa del Carmen and Tulum.

redEmpleadores.label: Employer network
redEmpleadores.subtitle: The best wellness establishments in the Riviera Maya trust Litsea to find certified talent.

howItWorks.label: The process
howItWorks.step1Desc: Therapists register their professional profile, certified techniques and areas where they can work.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Hotels post job opportunities and therapists can apply directly from the platform.
howItWorks.step3Desc: The Litsea team reviews applications and enables the chat between therapist and employer.
howItWorks.step4Desc: The hotel interviews the therapist and the hiring is finalized.

paraEmpleadores.label: For employers
paraEmpleadores.subtitle: Access an exclusive network of wellness professionals, ready to elevate the experience at your spa or hotel.
paraEmpleadores.benefit1Desc: All therapists are verified graduates of Litsea Centro de Capacitación. Zero risk of fake profiles.
paraEmpleadores.benefit2Desc: We review and validate every profile to ensure quality and professionalism before showing it to employers.
paraEmpleadores.benefit3Desc: Post vacancies and connect with qualified candidates in record time, without unnecessary intermediaries.

ctaFinal.label: Join now
ctaFinal.subtitle: Join the platform that is transforming the way the best spas and hotels find their therapists.
ctaFinal.cardTerapeutaDesc: Sign up, upload your Litsea certificate and apply to vacancies at the most exclusive hotels in the Riviera Maya.
ctaFinal.cardEmpleadorDesc: Post vacancies and access certified therapists verified by Litsea, ready to work at your spa.

pageTitles.loginDesc: Sign in to Litsea Empleos to access your therapist, employer or administrator dashboard.
pageTitles.registroTerapeutaDesc: Create your account as a Litsea-certified therapist and access vacancies at luxury hotels and spas in the Riviera Maya.
pageTitles.registroEmpleadorDesc: Create your account as a hotel or spa and post vacancies for therapists certified by Litsea Centro de Capacitación.

whatsapp.name: Litsea Empleos
whatsapp.bubble: Hi! How can we help you? Send us a message on WhatsApp.
whatsapp.defaultMessage: Hello, I'd like to know more about Litsea Job Board.

resetPassword.title: Reset password
resetPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
resetPassword.checkEmailMessage: We sent a link to {email} to reset your password.
resetPassword.confirmSubtitle: Enter and confirm your new password.
resetPassword.errorTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
resetPassword.errorGeneric: Error sending email. Please try again.
resetPassword.errorLinkExpired: The link has expired. Request a new one.

auth.loginAdminErrorNotAdmin: This account does not have administrator permissions.
auth.loginTerapeutaSubtitle: Access your dashboard and manage your applications
auth.loginEmpleadorSubtitle: Access your dashboard and manage your vacancies
auth.registerTerapeutaSubtitle: Build your profile and access vacancies at luxury spas and hotels
auth.registerEmpleadorSubtitle: Post vacancies and connect with certified therapists
auth.errorTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
auth.errorEmailTaken: This email already has an account. Sign in.
auth.errorCreateAccount: Error creating account. Please try again.
auth.errorSignInGeneric: Error signing in. Please try again.
auth.successCheckEmailMessage: We sent a confirmation link to {email}.
